tagline: Single story test — no reviewer interference

stories.title: Accessibility and Performance Audit — WCAG 2.1 AA + Core Web Vitals
stories.description:
Perform a comprehensive accessibility and performance audit of smoothrevenue.com. Read index.html, styles.css, privacy.html, impressum.html, terms.html. Check and FIX:
1. All images must have meaningful alt text (no empty alt="")
2. All interactive elements must have focus states
3. Color contrast ratios must be 4.5:1 minimum for normal text, 3:1 for large text
4. All form fields must have associated <label> elements
5. The page must have proper heading hierarchy (h1 → h2 → h3, no skips)
6. All external links must have rel="noopener noreferrer"
7. The page must be keyboard-navigable (no tabindex=-1 traps)
8. Check that prefers-reduced-motion is respected

Do NOT touch any files outside showcase/smoothrevenue-build/

Do NOT just report — actually fix all found issues in the HTML/CSS files.

Target files: showcase/smoothrevenue-build/index.html, showcase/smoothrevenue-build/styles.css
acceptance_criteria: Read ALL HTML files in showcase/smoothrevenue-build/
Fix ALL found accessibility issues in HTML/CSS files
Verify all images have alt text
Verify all form fields have labels
Run: python -m ruff check showcase/smoothrevenue-build/ --output-format=concise → 0 errors
